arena_scorer_hardening.target_quantity: live scorer parity must distinguish exact local-versus-official numerical comparison from liveness-only checks
forbidden_claim_patterns: live verifiers match local implementations to machine precision

fm_stretched_lr.target_quantity: signs of coefficients of the stretching polynomial t -> c^(t lambda)_(t mu,t nu), not nonnegativity of the evaluated LR values
